SELECT sqrt(value) FROM numbers WHERE value >= 0;
SELECT sqrt(n1.value + n2.value) FROM numbers n1, numbers n2 WHERE n1.value = 4.0 AND n2.value = 16.0;
SELECT sqrt((SELECT AVG(value) FROM numbers) + 1) AS average_sqrt FROM numbers;
SELECT n1.value, sqrt(n1.value) FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.value < n2.value WHERE n2.value > 10.0;
WITH valid_numbers AS (SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value >= 0) SELECT AVG(sqrt(value)) FROM valid_numbers;
SELECT sqrt(COALESCE((SELECT value FROM numbers WHERE value < 0), 0)) AS safe_sqrt;
SELECT sqrt(CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE)) AS null_sqrt;
